privileged_info_summary: The regional_rls_security task uses synthetic sales data (sales_data.csv) with 1000 rows spanning 2023-01-01 to 2024-01-01, containing four regions (North, South, East, West) and five sales representatives. The task requires creating a Power BI report named Regional_RLS_Report.pbix with four RLS roles (North_Manager, South_Manager, East_Manager, West_Manager) filtering by Region column, a DAX measure named Total_Sales (SUM of Sales_Amount), and a Sales Summary page containing a clustered column chart and table visual showing Region, Sales_Rep, and Sales_Amount. Verifier uses a result JSON file (rls_result.json) to validate the output, with a passing score of 70+ points out of 100.
